steps.title: Agent Memory and Tool Caching
steps.text: Surgewave provides persistent memory and tool result caching for AI agents. Agents can learn from interactions, recall facts across sessions, and avoid redundant external tool calls.

steps.title: IAgentMemoryStore
steps.text: The core memory interface supports save, get, delete, search, and list operations scoped per agent. Two backends are available: InMemory for testing and File for persistence across restarts.

steps.title: Memory Types and Context
steps.text: Six memory types classify agent knowledge: ConversationSummary, LearnedFact, UserPreference, ToolResult, Episodic, and Procedural. AgentMemoryContext provides a convenient scoped API with RecallAsync and SaveFactAsync helpers.

steps.title: Tool Result Caching
steps.text: CachedAgentTool wraps any agent tool with transparent caching using SHA-256 hashed keys. CachingToolProvider wraps an entire tool provider with per-tool TTL overrides and exclusions. Error results are never cached.
